name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/defi-orchestrator
description: Multi-step DeFi strategy orchestration — swaps, lending, yields on Base/EVM

environmentVariables.description: RPC endpoint URL (defaults to Base mainnet)
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Premium API key for execution access
environmentVariables.name: THRYX_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Private key for executing strategies and swaps on-chain
environmentVariables.name: DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY
